recentArticles.title: Kanye is slated to play Chicago concerts in September - Chicago Tribune
recentArticles.snippet: Music and Concerts |   Kanye is slated to play Chicago concerts in…. * Share on Facebook (Opens in new window) Facebook. * Share on Bluesky (Opens in new window) Bluesky. * Share on X (Opens in new window) X. # Kanye is slated to play Chicago concerts in September. Kanye West, aka Ye, has added his hometown of Chicago to his global tour this summer, and is scheduled to play a pair of concerts at Soldier Field on Sept. He also added a July 4 show at the Alamodome in San Antonio, and two concerts in Tampa, Florida, later this month. The shows were added to his website on Monday morning. Ye last performed in Chicago in 2021, when he presented a listening party for his album “Donda” at Soldier Field. His concerts elsewhere have been protested or canceled as part of a backlash over Ye’s history of antisemitic remarks, which in some cases he has apologized for. ## More in Music and Concerts.

recentArticles.snippet: # Kim Kardashian Supports Ariana Grande at ‘Eternal Sunshine’ Tour Stop in L.A. ## Kim Kardashian AT ARIANA GRANDE'S TOUR WE CAN BE FRIENDS ... **Kim Kardashian** turned a night at **Ariana Grande**’s "Eternal Sunshine" concert into a viral moment ... The SKIMS founder was seen in the audience alongside former 'American Horror Story' co-star **Emma Roberts**, with the pair blending into the crowd as Ariana took the stage for a packed performance. Despite the attempt to keep things low-key, fans quickly noticed Kim, who was also seen alongside Ari's mom **Joan**, in the venue and began sharing clips online showing her vibing at the show. Kim also posted her own video from the concert, giving followers a glimpse of the atmosphere as Ariana performed for a sold-out crowd -- singing along to some of Ari's banger hits. recentArticles.title: Jakob Nowell on Sublime’s Future: ‘It’s Truly Never Over’ - Newsweek
recentArticles.snippet: # Jakob Nowell on Sublime’s Future: ‘It’s Truly Never Over’. In his earlier interview with *Newsweek*, Nowell summed up the challenge in a line that still defines this phase of the band: “You can’t out-myth the original myth.” Sublime, now featuring Nowell alongside original members Eric Wilson and Bud Gaugh, has leaned into that reality while rolling out new material, including “Ensenada” and *Until The Sun Explodes*. Nowell says reception to the latest single and the album's title track, *Until the Sun Explodes*, gave the band another signal they were connecting with audiences. Nowell holds the familial connection close, adding, “and my victory lap, or like a thank you letter, a love letter to my dad and all of his friends and the family and everybody in the scene and all the fans as well.”. “At the end of the day, the sun's gonna explode someday, so you kind of have to smile and just say thank you to everything that came before you, and it really all culminated in that title track.”.
recentArticles.summary: Jakob Nowell on Sublime’s Future: ‘It’s Truly Never Over’ - Newsweek

recentArticles.title: Anuv Jain Doesn't Know If He's Made It Yet. He Might Never. - Forbes
recentArticles.snippet: # Anuv Jain Doesn't Know If He's Made It Yet. He Might Never. Anuv Jain is currently on the North American leg of his sold-out \*Dastakhat\* World Tour, drawing diverse international audiences. The third act of a live trilogy that began with *Dastakein* in 2021 and *Guldasta* in 2023, it’s expanded this year to sold-out venues across six American cities, with audiences drawn from countries he had not imagined were listening. "From the get go, I knew that I’m not going to do covers," he says. I wanted them to know that the day they are coming to my show or if they're listening to my music, they are only listening to my music." Everybody told him this was the wrong strategy. "I was told that I was going to be sitting in his chair," he says. I do not want to give up my songs right now because I know that they are worth something." He still owns 100% of his music.
recentArticles.summary: Anuv Jain Doesn't Know If He's Made It Yet. He Might Never. - Forbes

recentArticles.title: KFC launches new menu items and updated logo — establishes ‘next chapter’ in its global brand refresh - New York Post
recentArticles.snippet: # KFC launches new menu items and updated logo — establishes ‘next chapter’ in its global brand refresh. KFC is launching what it calls its “next chapter” globally, rolling out new menu items, redesigned restaurants and refreshed branding as the fast-food giant looks to strengthen its position in the increasingly competitive chicken market. The Yum Brands-owned chain said Monday that the initiative will eventually touch its more than 34,000 restaurants across over 150 countries. “As the global appetite for chicken grows, KFC is answering the call,” KFC Global CEO Scott Mezvinsky said in a statement. KFC plans to expand its lineup of boneless chicken offerings, including tenders designed for dipping and snacking, while introducing more than 20 new sauces tailored to local tastes. KFC adds new menu items and updates its logo as part of its "next chapter." KFC. KFC will introduce more than 20 new sauces, including Chimichurri Ranch and Hot Honey Habanero.
recentArticles.summary: KFC launches new menu items and updated logo — establishes ‘next chapter’ in its global brand refresh - New York Post

recentArticles.title: Joe: Tiny Desk Concert - WKNO FM
recentArticles.snippet: # Joe: Tiny Desk Concert. *This Black Music Month, Tiny Desk celebrates the undeniable legacy of BET. R&B veteran Joe Thomas earned every chain and stripe on his body as he stepped behind the Tiny Desk. Before the music started, the singer-songwriter and producer explained: "Where have I been for the past few years? I'm here with you all today, and I wanna do a few songs throughout the catalog.". He quickly gathers the entire audience in one hand, blazing through songs like "Good Girls," "The Love Scene" and the dirty macking anthem, "All the Things (Your Man Won't Do)." Joe closes the set with a tender moment, inviting his daughter, Kayla, to sing background on his biggest hit, "I Wanna Know.". Bobby Carter is a leader on the Tiny Desk Concerts team for NPR Music. He's brought an ever growing roster of big names and emerging artists through NPR's HQ to squeeze behind the desk of All Songs Considered host Bob Boilen and record standout performances, including Usher, Mac Miller, Noname, Anderson.Paak and H.E.R. See stories by Bobby Carter.
recentArticles.summary: Joe: Tiny Desk Concert - WKNO FM

recentArticles.snippet: # Joe: Tiny Desk Concert. *This Black Music Month, Tiny Desk celebrates the undeniable legacy of BET. R&B veteran Joe Thomas earned every chain and stripe on his body as he stepped behind the Tiny Desk. Before the music started, the singer-songwriter and producer explained: "Where have I been for the past few years? I'm here with you all today, and I wanna do a few songs throughout the catalog.". Each of the "few songs"Joe refers to is a chart-topping, gold and platinum-selling smash from the '90s and early 2000s. He quickly gathers the entire audience in one hand, blazing through songs like "Good Girls," "The Love Scene" and the dirty macking anthem, "All the Things (Your Man Won't Do)." Joe closes the set with a tender moment, inviting his daughter, Kayla, to sing background on his biggest hit, "I Wanna Know.". Bobby Carter is a leader on the Tiny Desk Concerts team for NPR Music.

recentArticles.title: ‘The Vampire Lestat’ Episode-2 Recap: Vampire Incest - Vulture
recentArticles.snippet: Gabriella has zero maternal instincts, but still has an affinity towards her youngest son, not as a mother, but as a fellow human with a philosopher’s soul, stranded amongst the “cabbages” (derogatory, even though in French, cabbage — *chou —* is a term of endearment.) I’m sure the two of them use the “not as a mother” excuse a *lot* to justify their extrafamilial relations — she never *felt* like his mom, your honor! The band is still freaking out over the revelation that their “vampire” frontman is an actual vampire, but Lestat is just chuffed that his mother “came a great distance to comfort me” — the poor baby is completely unaware that she so clearly is up to some sort of ulterior scheme — and in voiceover he tells the audience that we are “being very patient regarding the vampire incest factor, and I do appreciate it.” How are we feeling about these sorts of on-the-nose script/narration beats?
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞內容與周杰倫無關，主要探討美劇《吸血鬼萊斯特》第二集的劇情回顧與角色關係。

recentArticles.title: YouTube To Spotlight Artists, Venues In Live Music Initiative 06/16/2026 - MediaPost
recentArticles.snippet: *   Become A MediaPost Member Subscribe to your choice of industry specific newsletters, save $100 on conferences, search member directories, comment on stories and more. In line with Snapchat's live music initiatives, YouTube has announced the launch of “Music Nights,” a series of live concerts featuring a variety of famous artists performing in major cities across the globe. This includes hip-hop artist Isaiah Rashad, who recently released his fifth studio album “It's Been Awful” and has 1.7 million monthly YouTube Music listeners; as well as eight-time Grammy winner and country star Kacey Musgraves, who just released her sixth studio album “Middle of Nowhere” and has over 6 million monthly listeners; and Bleachers, Jack Antonoff's New Jersey-based band, which has over 1 million YouTube Music listeners and released the album “Everyone For Ten Minutes” in May. YouTube's Music Nights series builds off of the platform's long-standing reputation for being a hub for music fans and music discovery.

recentArticles.title: Taylor Swift nods to ‘Midnights’ era with ‘70-inspired studio look - Page Six
recentArticles.snippet: Taylor Swift rocked a ’70s vibe for a trip to Electric Lady Studios in New York City’s Greenwich Village Monday, sporting a casual but stylish outfit for her visit to the famed recording studio. Swift has been in the city for the past few days, attending Game 4 of the Knicks vs. Spurs NBA Finals on Wednesday, making history as the youngest woman ever to be inducted into the Songwriters Hall of Fame last Thursday, and enjoying several date nights with her fiance Travis Kelce, including an evening at the Broadway production of “Oh, Mary!” this past weekend. New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani candidly dropped a major hint about Swift and Kelce’s forthcoming wedding while discussing security measures being taken for the FIFA World Cup 2026. “We know it coincides with July 4, America 250, Taylor Swift’s wedding — all happening at the same time — and we are so excited to welcome the world here,” he concluded.
recentArticles.summary: Taylor Swift nods to ‘Midnights’ era with ‘70-inspired studio look - Page Six

recentArticles.title: 'Michael' dethrones 'Bohemian Rhapsody' as top-grossing music biopic - USA Today
recentArticles.snippet: ## The King of Pop is officially the king of the box office: The "Michael" movie starring Jaafar Jackson is now the top-grossing musical biopic ever. The King of Pop is officially the king of the box office. "Michael," the movie about Michael Jackson's life starring the singer's nephew Jaafar Jackson in the lead role, has reached a major milestone in its impressive box office run: It is officially the highest-grossing musical biopic of all time. "Michael" has now surpassed that haul with a global take of $932.2 million and counting as of June 14, according to Lionsgate. The movie debuted to a massive $97 million at the domestic box office in April, setting a new record for biggest opening weekend for a musical biopic of all time. At the global box office, "Michael" is the second highest-grossing movie of 2026 so far.
recentArticles.summary: 這則新聞報導麥可傑克森的傳記電影《Michael》打破票房紀錄，成為史上最高票房的音樂傳記片，內容與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.title: Jakob Nowell used to call Sublime 'his dad's band.' But new album proves 'Now it's our band. It’s us' - Los Angeles Times
recentArticles.snippet: # Jakob Nowell used to call Sublime ‘his dad’s band.’ But new album proves ‘Now it’s our band. There was a time in the beginning of Sublime’s recent revival when Jakob Nowell, the son of the band’s late singer Bradley Nowell, saw himself simply as a good son trying to help his adoptive uncles — drummer Bud Gaugh and bassist Eric Wilson — restart his dad’s iconic Long Beach trio. Sublime is my dad’s band, and I’m helping out, that’s all,” he told The Times in 2024. We showed up, Jake had an idea for another song, and he sent us a little demo and said “Hey, this is what I’ve been thinking about.” And then we get down to the studio [in San Pedro], and he’s like, “Oh yeah, so I had another idea,” and kind of changed it. We get in there to do a take for a song, and I’m always like “Let’s just do like three more!” It’s just that much fun, and that’s how it feels playing live too.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導主要關於樂團Sublime及其新專輯，與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.title: Music Artist Samuel Embracing All His Roots With EP ‘SAMUELito’ - Forbes
recentArticles.snippet: # Music Artist Samuel Embracing All His Roots With EP ‘SAMUELito’. Musical artist Samuel has been through a lot in his young life. Now, he seems to know that with his newly released album, *SAMUELito*. “I started very young, and I just felt like I’m coming back to where I first started, when I was born, growing up, what I ate, the environment, the people I was with, and the music I listened to.”. He decided that was the perfect title for the album, which blends Latin rhythm and reggaeton energy with his experience in the Korean pop music scene. “I just felt this would be a fresh way that I could show my true identity,” he shares. After years of training in the Korean music system, he knew the structure of K-pop music and the performance aspects surrounding it. I’ve always wanted to do Spanish music, and it just felt like now was the perfect time to do this.”.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導關於音樂人Samuel發行新專輯《SAMUELito》，融合拉丁、雷鬼與韓流元素，展現其真實身份，內容與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.snippet: A password will be e-mailed to you. Home News From ship engines to studio sessions: 6ixty returns with self-produced “The Redman... # From ship engines to studio sessions: 6ixty returns with self-produced “The Redman EP”. Now, the Accra-based composer/rapper is gearing up for his most personal release yet. \_The Redman EP\_, a 7-track project entirely written, arranged, and produced by 6ixty himself, drops June 15, 2026. Fans got their first taste of his sound with 2019’s \_Nyamekye\_ EP, home to \_Close to You\_, \_Nyamekye\_, and \_Vibes\_. But \_The Redman\_ levels up the ambition. Tracklist: \_Disco Tech\_, \_Come With Me\_, \_Moon Steps\_, \_Time Will Tell\_, \_Night Life\_, \_Far Gone\_, and \_Dance\_. ### Let Love Lead NGO marks 4th annual sanitation drive with major clean-up in Nima. In a move set to shatter long-standing stigmas, the KGL Foundation has officially handed over an ultra-modern Out-Patient Department (OPD) to the Accra Psychiatric...

recentArticles.title: Michael Jackson Ties His Own Longest Run At No. 1 - Yahoo News UK
recentArticles.snippet: # Michael Jackson Ties His Own Longest Run At No. 1. He once again leads the R&B Streaming Songs chart, keeping himself from scoring a new No. 1 and tying his most impressive streak at the summit. ## "Billie Jean" Holds at No. 1. "Billie Jean" holds at No. 1 on the R&B Streaming Songs chart, as it is once again the most-played R&B tune on platforms such as Spotify, Apple Music and others throughout the United States. As "Billie Jean" scores its fifth week at No. 1 on the R&B Streaming Songs chart, it ties his previously set longest run in the uppermost space. "Billie Jean" and "Thriller" are currently tied as Jackson's longest-running rulers on the R&B Streaming Songs chart. "Billie Jean" has enjoyed such a powerful run at No. 1 on the R&B Streaming Songs chart that it has stopped two blockbusters by Jackson from finally reaching the top space.
recentArticles.summary: 這則新聞報導了Michael Jackson的歌曲《Billie Jean》在R&B串流歌曲榜上追平了他個人最長的冠軍紀錄，與周杰倫無關。
